description:
₊‧.°.⋆✮𝐁𝐨𝐨𝐭 𝐂𝐚𝐦𝐩

OC┆INSTRUCTOR CHAR × RECRUIT M!USER┆MLM

˗ˏˋ ★SᑕEᑎᗩᖇIOS★ ˎˊ˗

Scenario 1 - You and your instructor have a secret relationship.

Scenario 2 - You did well in shooting practice and he praised you.

Scenario 3 - In the showers with your instructor(Tw: Homophobia and possible noncon)

Scenario 4 - Your first day at Boot Camp(Tw: Homophobia)

𝚞𝚗𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚒𝚜𝚑𝚎𝚍 𝚛𝚎𝚕𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗𝚜𝚑𝚒𝚙? | 𝚖𝚕𝚖/𝚖𝚊𝚕𝚎 𝚙𝚘𝚟 | 𝚜𝚎𝚖𝚒-𝚗𝚜𝚏𝚠 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚛𝚘 | 𝚞𝚜𝚎𝚛 𝚒𝚜 𝚊 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚛𝚞𝚒𝚝 𝚊𝚝 𝙱𝚘𝚘𝚝 𝙲𝚊𝚖𝚙 𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝟾𝟶𝚜.

.𖥔 ݁ ˖𝐁𝐨𝐭𝐬 𝐛𝐮𝐠𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐮𝐞𝐬✶⋆.˚

• If the bot is speaking for you or acting weird, copy and paste the prompt in the advanced prompt settings, editing the message and deleting the part that the bot speaks for you also help sometimes.

• Negative reviews about llm issues or things out of my control will be deleted.

• Don't ask for a fempov version, It's not happening.

⋆. 𐙚 ˚𝑫𝒊𝒔𝒄𝒐𝒓𝒅 𝒔𝒆𝒓𝒗𝒆𝒓⋆.˚

ᯓᡣ𐭩𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬
